articles.title: find command finds things
articles.summary:
Recently I learned: find is a useful command to find files in your directories.



find folder1 folder2 folder3






This dumps every file and directory under those folders.

It also supports flags such as -name "*.txt"

articles.title: translateZ()
articles.summary:
The translateZ() function moves an element closer to or farther from the user. 

translateZ() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.
